title: Extension WebSocket connect + full key exchange flow
description: Verify the extension-side connection flow from connect() through encrypted session establishment

steps.action: Call connect(host, token) with valid credentials
steps.expected: WebSocket opens, auth message sent, key exchange initiated

steps.action: Observe the key exchange sequence from the extension side
steps.expected: Extension sends key-exchange with public key, receives daemon's, derives session key, sends encrypted hello, receives hello-ack
Session state includes: connected=true, host, encrypted=true
Error callback fires with 'Authentication failed', connection closed
WebSocket closed, chrome.storage.session cleared, badge updated
